heading: Hearings and orders
label: 41304 Hearings and orders

children.heading: .—Opportunity for Hearing
children.label: a .—Opportunity for Hearing
children.text: The Federal Maritime Commission shall provide an opportunity for a hearing before issuing an order relating to a violation of this part or a regulation prescribed under this part.

children.heading: .—Modification of Order
children.label: b .—Modification of Order
children.text: The Commission may reverse, suspend, or modify any of its orders.

children.heading: .—Rehearing
children.label: c .—Rehearing
children.text: On application of a party to a proceeding, the Commission may grant a rehearing of the same or any matter determined in the proceeding. Except by order of the Commission, a rehearing does not operate as a stay of an order.

children.heading: .—Period of Effectiveness
children.label: d .—Period of Effectiveness
children.text: An order of the Commission remains in effect for the period specified in the order or until suspended, modified, or set aside by the Commission or a court of competent jurisdiction.
